structural_infeasibility_assessment: SOUND -- three stated reasons are technically correct: (1) production module crypto binding frozen at load time, not interceptable by vi.spyOn from test; (2) crafted inputs fail pre-transaction (validators at pages.service.ts:132-144); (3) transactional EntityManager obtained internally at pages.service.ts:145 is not exposed
